raw_response: Given your quality sensitivity and brand familiarity with Bose, the Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones are an excellent choice for gym running. They offer outstanding noise cancellation and a comfortable over-ear design that stays secure during workouts. With a battery life of up to 24 hours, you won't need frequent recharges. Though they are pricey, their immersive audio and luxurious comfort make them worth the investment.
